basic_details.job_title: DLSA Jhabua Vehicle Driver Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.organization_name: District Legal Services Authority Jhabua (DLSA Jhabua)
basic_details.short_information: District Legal Services Authority Jhabua (DLSA Jhabua) Vehicle Driver Notification 2026 has been released on 04-05-2026 on the official website jhabua.dcourts.gov.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the DLSA Jhabua Vehicle Driver Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: No upper age limit specified. Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: 10th Pass, Valid Driving License, Driving Experience, Vehicle Mechanic Experience (Preferred)
qualification.details: 10th pass from a recognized institution. Must possess a valid Driving License. Must have driving experience. Preference will be given to candidates with vehicle mechanic experience.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for DLSA Jhabua Vehicle Driver Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://jhabua.dcourts.gov.in/.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 30-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the DLSA Jhabua Vehicle Driver recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the DLSA Jhabua Vehicle Driver recruitment is 30th May 2026. Ensure your application reaches the authorities before this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the minimum age requirement for the Vehicle Driver post?
faq.answer: The minimum age requirement for the Vehicle Driver post is 18 years. There is no specified upper age limit in the notification.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Vehicle Driver position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Vehicle Driver position will receive a salary of Rs. 12,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q4. What are the essential qualifications for the Vehicle Driver role?
faq.answer: Candidates must have passed the 10th standard, possess a valid driving license, and have driving experience. Experience in vehicle mechanics is preferred.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process is offline. You need to download the application form, fill it correctly, attach necessary documents, and send it to the official address mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Vehicle Driver post?
faq.answer: The selection process includes application scrutiny, followed by an interview and a driving test.

faq.question: Q8. What is the total number of vacancies for the Vehicle Driver post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the post of Vehicle Driver in the District Legal Services Authority Jhabua.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of DLSA Jhabua, the link for which is provided in the Important Links section.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The job type for the Vehicle Driver position is on a contract basis.
